languages.text: "И пусть! Довольно мы взирали, как Валанциус попирает Кредо. Пора выжечь ересь из каждого угла его замка!"
languages.translation_comment: сестра битвы в разговоре с инквизитором (разговор на троих), говорит второй

traits.locale_text: "И пусть! Довольно мы взирали, как Валанциус попирает Кредо. Пора выжечь ересь из каждого угла его замка!"

languages.text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"
languages.original_text: "И пусть! Довольно мы взирали, как Валанциус попирает Кредо. Пора выжечь ересь из каждого угла его замка!"

traits.locale_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"
"So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"
"So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

languages.text: "So sei es! Wir haben gesehen, wie Valancius den Glauben mit Füßen tritt. Es wird Zeit, die Ketzerei in jedem Winkel seines Schlosses auszubrennen!"
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: "So sei es! Wir haben gesehen, wie Valancius den Glauben mit Füßen tritt. Es wird Zeit, die Ketzerei in jedem Winkel seines Schlosses auszubrennen!"

languages.text: “那就这样吧！我们中已经有太多人目睹冯·瓦兰修斯践踏帝国信仰了。是时候把他城堡里每个角落的异端都烧干净了！”
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: “那就这样吧！我们中已经有太多人目睹冯·瓦兰修斯践踏帝国信仰了。是时候把他城堡里每个角落的异端都烧干净了！”

languages.text: « Très bien ! Von Valancius piétine le Credo Impérial depuis trop longtemps. Il est temps de purger l'hérésie de son château par le feu ! »
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: « Très bien ! Von Valancius piétine le Credo Impérial depuis trop longtemps. Il est temps de purger l'hérésie de son château par le feu ! »

languages.text: «¡Que así sea! Muchos de nosotros hemos visto a von Valancius pisotear el Credo. ¡Ya va siendo hora de purgar a fuego la herejía de todos los rincones de este castillo!».
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Que así sea! Muchos de nosotros hemos visto a von Valancius pisotear el Credo. ¡Ya va siendo hora de purgar a fuego la herejía de todos los rincones de este castillo!».

languages.text: "Öyle olsun! Von Valanciusların İtikat'ı çiğnemesini yeterince izledik. Kalelerinin her bir köşesindeki kâfirliği yakıp kül etme zamanı!"
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: "Öyle olsun! Von Valanciusların İtikat'ı çiğnemesini yeterince izledik. Kalelerinin her bir köşesindeki kâfirliği yakıp kül etme zamanı!"

languages.text: 「そうじゃ！ヴァランシウスが教義を踏みにじるのを、我々は十分に見てきた。彼の城の隅々から異端を焼き尽くす時が来た！」
languages.original_text: "So be it! Enough of us have watched von Valancius trample on the Creed. It's time to burn the heresy out of every corner of his castle!"

traits.locale_text: 「そうじゃ！ヴァランシウスが教義を踏みにじるのを、我々は十分に見てきた。彼の城の隅々から異端を焼き尽くす時が来た！」
